perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with white text on a solid black background. A woman wearing a cream-colored dress and a beret appears at the entrance of a 'hahababy' pop-up store, gesturing excitedly. (2) She moves through various sections of the store, pointing to displays of colorful safety helmets, patterned mugs, gift boxes, food products, and rows of clothing. Close-ups show detailed shots of these items. She enters and showcases a large fitting room with a yellow polka-dot curtain. (3) She stands behind a yellow checkout counter holding a promotional flyer, waving goodbye before the scene transitions to a static informational graphic about the event.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic pop music begins immediately. A male voice introduces the concept of dubbing the 'boss lady's' video. (2) As the visuals move through the store, the male voice provides a fast-paced, humorous narration, speaking as if he were the woman on screen. Periodic sound effects like 'dings', 'swooshes', and 'shimmers' occur when specific products are featured. (3) The music maintains its fast tempo and rhythm until the final scene, where the narrator says 'Love you bye' and the audio fades out as the event info screen appears.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: '把闆娘的影片拿去配音' (Taking the Boss Lady's video to dub it) followed by '會變成什麼樣子' (What will it look like?). (2) Functional text: A countdown from '7' to '1' appears on screen. (3) Decorative text: '超超級大' (Super super big) and '笑穴!' (Laughter point) are used for emphasis. (4) Functional text: Subtitles providing a translation of the male narration. (5) Event details: 'Kaohsiung Hanshin Arena B1' and dates '04/17 - 05/14' appear at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Rapid Product & Store Tour -> Promotional CTA/Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 child running in background, approximately 3 female background shoppers, and 1 male figure visible on promotional posters.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair tied in a bun, wearing a beret and a cream-colored loose-fitting dress with 'HAHABABY' printed on the chest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A brightly lit retail space with yellow and blue branding. Shelves are stocked with organized merchandise including helmets, mugs, and snacks. Clothing racks and a large fitting room are also visible.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> List-based Product Showcase -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a creative advertisement designed to promote the 'hahababy' pop-up event in Kaohsiung. It uses a comedic 'husband-dubbing-wife' format to maintain high viewer engagement while methodically touring the store and highlighting a wide array of products, ultimately aiming to drive foot traffic to the Hanshin Arena location.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the store name, variety of products with their branding, price information, and specific event logistics (dates and location).

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed dubbing narration, 'Boss Lady' persona, signature brand color palette (yellow/blue).
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes the influencer's family dynamic and established brand voice to create a personalized and less 'corporate' feel for the promotional content.
